cases.subject: acezone headset
cases.body:
acezone headset
Hejsa jeg har et headset jeg lige har købt som gik ud mens jeg spillede og det ville ikke tænde nu efter det løb tør det lyser bare rød og men tænder ikke jeg kan få den til og sige paringlist clear og factory reset men det ville stadig ikke tænde går jeg så ind på appen på pcen med kablet i kan jeg få den til og connect og har updateret den men når jeg prøver på dongle siger den erro 8 hvad skyldes dette
cases.human_reply: Hej, Tak for at du rækker ud til os. Jeg er ked af at høre at du er løbet ind i problemer med dit A-Spire Wireless headset. Vi finder helt sikkert en løsning. Jeg tror at problemet ligger i at der nogen gange opstår et hang-up problem med Bluetooth. Der er to måder du kan genetablere forbindelsen på: Den ene er at slukke for dit headset og tage dit headset helt væk, mere end 30 meter, fra din telefon (og PC), som har bluetooth forbindelse til dit headset. Herfra kan du prøve at tænde for A-Spire Wireless og se om den ikke tænder på normal vis. Så sluk for headset'et igen, før du nærmer dig din telefon/PC. Nu kan du, på din mobil, slette A-Spire Wireless fra Bluetooth device listen og herefter slukke for Bluetooth. Tænd for Bluetooth igen og følg den normale process for at connect'e til A-Spire Wireless. Anden måde (for at opnå det samme): Rækkefølgen på det her er meget vigtig for at det får en effekt. Sluk for Bluetooth på både din Mobil og PC. Derefter sluk for dit headset (Hvis det allerede er slukket, så tænd og herefter sluk for det.) Der er en mulighed for at headsettet ikke har færdiggjort sin "slukke process" med Bluetooth, sidste gang den forsøgte at gøre det og det kan blokere for al kommunikation fremover. Tænd Bluetooth på din mobil og fjern A-Spire headset'et. Hold tænd knappen nede på dit headset, så den går i Pairing Mode og vælg A-Spire "igen". Nu kan du også tænde for Bluetooth på din PC. Nu burde du have en sund Bluetooth forbindelse. ps: I det tidsrum du er i Bluetooth pairing mode, har du ikke forbindelse til AceZone control app'en eller din PC. Jeg håber det bringer dit headset tilbage til at forbinde til både dongle, Bluetooth og USB-C. Du er altid velkommen til at række ud til os igen og vende tilbage med feedback. Med venlig hilsen / Kind regards, [Agent]

cases.subject: New customer message on 17 April 2026 at 16.43
cases.body:
New customer message on 17 April 2026 at 16.43
You received a new message from your online store's contact form. Country Code: DK Name: [redacted] Email: [email] Company / Team: [redacted] Country: Danmark If Applicable, Place Of Purchase And Order Number: [order number] What Is Your Request Regarding?: A-Spire Wireless What Do You Need Help With?: Connectivity / Pairing Body: Min app gider ikke virke når jeg prøver at Connect headset med appen, har et billede af den bare snurre og siger den ik kan Connect
cases.human_reply: Hej, Tak for at du rækker ud, vi er kede af at høre at du oplever problemer med forbindelsen. Det problem du oplever kan i de fleste tilfælde løses ved at slette/glemme headsettet fra dine Bluetooth gemte enheder, og derefter følge disse trin: (engelsk) Make sure your headset is powered on and that no cables are connected. Make sure your phone's Bluetooth is also powered on . Hold down the ANC button (next to the power button) for 4 seconds until you hear the pairing voice prompt. Open the AceZone app on your phone, and tap the "+" button to add a new headset. Tap on " A-Spire Wireless ". The app should find the headset and you can tap the " Connect" button. You should get a prompt from your phone to finish the pairing process . You'll hear voice prompt saying " pairing successful " and you can start using the app. Jeg håber dette løste dit problem, ræk endelig ud igen, hvis du har yderligere spørgsmål🙂 Hav en vidunderlig dag! Med venlig hilsen / Kind regards, [Agent]

cases.subject: Review
cases.body: I don’t want to leave you guys a bad review but my experience with AceZone has been absolutely the worst. I purchased a headset and didn't realize I bought your low end product. Immediately I reached out to cancel the order and there was no way to cancel it myself. I reached out to support and they were not able to cancel the order. Now after a week I just received the device I didn’t want. I’ll have to go to the post office later to return it. Just so I can order the headset I meant to order. This is entirely burdensome and unnecessary. Why wasn't I able to cancel my order? Why wasn't support able to cancel my order? Now I have to pay to send this back just so I can order the headset I wanted. What an unnecessary waste of time and resources. Please fix this process for others because honestly it makes me not even want to buy the other headset since this has been such a hassle. Worst experience I’ve ever had with a new product.
cases.human_reply:
Hi there,

I'm sorry to hear about your experience with the order cancellation process. Unfortunately, once an order is processed and shipped, we are unable to cancel it. This is why support was not able to assist with cancelling your order after it had been processed.

You mentioned wanting to return the product. You can do so within our 30-day return window.
I understand this has been frustrating, and I appreciate your feedback. We are always looking to improve our processes and will take your experience into consideration.

Thank you.

cases.human_reply: Hej igen, Jeg kan se, at vi allerede prøvede at opdatere Firmwaren. For at få donglen til at virke optimalt, anbefaler vi, at du sætter den i USB-stikket tættest på headsettet (og ikke bag ved computeren). Hvis der er andre trådløse forbindelser til headsettet, kan det forstyrre denne forbindelse også. Når donglen hopper af, vælger Windows så en anden enhed, eller forsvinder donglen helt? Prøv eventuelt andre USB indgange, både USB-A med adapteren, og USB-C - hvis muligt. Hvis problemet fortsætter, må du meget gerne skrive igen og eventuelt supplere med informationer om, hvad du har prøvet 🙂 Hav en fortsat god dag! Venlig Hilsen / Kind Regards, [Agent]

Den kan godt finde mit headset, dog står den bare og loader og loader. Jeg kommer aldrig videre. Kan det være en fejl på headset eller har i nogle forslag? Appen er prøvet at blevet geninstalleret?
cases.human_reply: Hej, Tak for at du rækker ud. Vi er kede af at høre at du oplever problemer med forbindelsen til appen. I de fleste tilfælde kan dette problem løses ved at slette/glemme dit A-Spire Wireless under din telefons bluetooth-enheder, og derefter følge de nedenstående trin: (engelsk) Make sure your headset is powered on and that no cables are connected. Make sure your phone's Bluetooth is also powered on . Hold down the ANC button (next to the power button) for 4 seconds until you hear the pairing voice prompt. Open the AceZone app on your phone, and tap the "+" button to add a new headset. Tap on " A-Spire Wireless ". The app should find the headset and you can tap the " Connect" button. You should get a prompt from your phone to finish the pairing process . You'll hear voice prompt saying " pairing successful " and you can start using the app. Jeg håber dette løste dit problem. Ræk endelig ud igen hvis appen fortsat ikke funger, eller hvis du har andre spørgsmål 🙂 Hav en vidunderlig dag! Med venlig hilsen / Kind regards, [Agent]

cases.subject: New customer message on 16 April 2026 at 08.51
cases.body:
New customer message on 16 April 2026 at 08.51
You received a new message from your online store's contact form. Country Code: DK Name: [redacted] Email: [email] Company / Team: Your Country: Danmark If Applicable, Place Of Purchase And Order Number: [order number] What Is Your Request Regarding?: A-Spire Wireless What Do You Need Help With?: Speaker / Microphone Issues Body: hejsa jeg har et headsæt fra jer af der slukker midt under spillet ...? og kan ikke lade det op og have det tændt samtidig....? vil sige kan ikke spille imens det lader
cases.human_reply: Hej, Tak for din besked. Det lyder underligt... Har du husket at opdatere headsettet og donglens firmware gennem vores AceZone FirmWare Updater software fra MS Store? Dette er vigtigt. Derudover, hvor længe går der før headsettet slukker? Gå eventuelt ind på AceZone mobil appen, og slå Standby Timer fra (System). Hvis disse to ikke ændrer problemet, kan du prøve følgende guide (Engelsk): With the headset powered on and connected to your PC via USB-C cable, open the Device Manager window on your PC. Find the headset under Sound, video and game controllers, then right-click it and uninstall the drivers. Unplug the headset Plug it back into the same USB port . ( If you want to use it on another USB port, you have to follow this process again, as the driver belongs to the specific USB port you are using ). After that, try to do a factory reset: Turn the headset off . Press and hold power button for 15 seconds. A voice prompt will tell you a factory reset has been made. Please note that this will delete all saved Bluetooth connections from your headset, including your phone/PC and dongle. You should also delete the headset from your phone/PC's saved devices, as well as delete it from the AceZone app before pairing again. We'll need to re-pair the headset and the dongle: Plug the dongle into your PC. Reset the dongle by holding down the button until the LED turns purple . Remove the dongle. Turn your headset on, and make sure no cables are connected . Hold the Noise Cancelling mode button (right next to the power button) for 4 seconds to enable pairing mode. Plug the dongle back in. The LED will blink blue/red. Pairing will happen automatically. The LED will turn blue when the pairing is done. Det lyder underligt, at headsettet ikke kan lade imens det tænder, så prøv eventuelt også et separat kabel, for at udelukke kabel problemer. Jeg glæder mig til at høre resultatet! Hav en fantastisk dag. Venlig Hilsen / Kind Regards, [Agent]

cases.subject: New customer message on 29 April 2026 at 13.20
cases.body:
New customer message on 29 April 2026 at 13.20
You received a new message from your online store's contact form. Country Code: DK Name: [redacted] Email: [email] Company / Team: Your Country: Denmark If Applicable, Place Of Purchase And Order Number: Place of purchase: AceZone (official website) Order number: [order number] What Is Your Request Regarding?: A-Blaze What Do You Need Help With?: Other Body: Hej AceZone Support, Jeg skriver angående mit AceZone A-Blaze headset, som ser ud til at være defekt. Headsettet kan godt oprette forbindelse, men der kommer ikke lyd ud det meste af tiden. Jeg kan dog høre lyd, når jeg slår mikrofonen fra og til. Hvis jeg slukker og tænder headsettet, kommer lyden tilbage kortvarigt, men forsvinder derefter igen. Jeg har allerede prøvet følgende: Brug af en anden computer Udskiftning af forskellige kabler Problemet fortsætter stadig på trods af dette. Jeg vil derfor høre, hvad næste skridt er, og om det er muligt at få det repareret eller ombyttet. På forhånd tak for hjælpen. Venlig hilsen [redacted]
cases.human_reply: Hej [redacted], Tak fordi du kontakter os. Det er ærgerligt at høre, at du oplever problemer med dit A-Blaze headset. Lad os prøve et par ting for at løse problemet. Først, sørg for at opdatere headsettets firmware ved at bruge vores AceZone FirmWare Updater, som kan downloades fra Microsoft Store. Dette gælder også for donglen, hvis du bruger trådløs forbindelse. Hvordan har du opsat headsettet? Bruger du kablet eller trådløs forbindelse? Siden du har prøvet forskellige kabler, kan jeg forstå at problemet sker med kablet forbindelse. Derfor vil jeg anbefale dig at prøve denne guide (Engelsk): With the headset powered on and connected to your PC via USB-C cable, open the Device Manager window on your PC. Find the headset under Sound, video and game controllers, then right-click it and uninstall the drivers. Unplug the headset Plug it back into the same USB port . ( If you want to use it on another USB port, you have to follow this process again, as the driver belongs to the specific USB port you are using ). After that, try to do a factory reset: Turn the headset off . Press and hold power button for 15 seconds. A voice prompt will tell you a factory reset has been made. Please note that this will delete all saved Bluetooth connections from your headset, including your phone/PC and dongle. You should also delete the headset from your phone/PC's saved devices, as well as delete it from the AceZone app before pairing again. We'll need to re-pair the headset and the dongle: Plug the dongle into your PC. Reset the dongle by holding down the button until the LED turns purple . Remove the dongle. Turn your headset on, and make sure no cables are connected . Hold the Noise Cancelling mode button (right next to the power button) for 4 seconds to enable pairing mode. Plug the dongle back in. The LED will blink blue/red. Pairing will happen automatically. The LED will turn blue when the pairing is done. Vend endelig tilbage med, om det gjorde en forskel 😃 Hav en god dag. [Agent]

Body:
Hej jeg har købt et headset af jer for et par måneder
siden. Og er super tilfreds med det! Dog er der sket det at
halvdelen af mit headset er spræket uden nogen form for slag
eller tryk. Jeg har taget det af, og den eneste grund til jeg
opdagede skaden var en flig fra høretlf. faldt af. Jeg vil høre
om der på nogen måde er mulighed for ombytning?
cases.human_reply:
Tak fordi du kontakter os. Vi er kede af at høre, at du oplever problemer med dit A-Spire Wireless headset. Vi vil gerne hjælpe dig med en ombytning.

For at vi kan starte processen, bedes du venligst sende os et foto af skaden samt dit ordrenummer. Når vi har modtaget disse oplysninger, vil vi gå videre med processen.

Jeg ser frem til at høre fra dig.

cases.subject: Vedrørende ordre; [order number]
cases.body:
Vedrørende ordre; [order number]
Hej AceZone, Jeg skriver til jer, da jeg har modtaget mit nye A-Spire Wireless headset, som desværre har en kritisk batterifejl. I lover en batteritid på op til 35 timer, men mit headset holder maksimalt strøm i 8 timer. Problemet bliver særligt tydeligt, når batteriet når 50 %; herfra drænes det fuldstændigt på blot 30-40 minutter. Jeg har naturligvis sørget for, at firmwaren er fuldt opdateret, men det har desværre ikke ændret på situationen. Jeg må ærligt sige, at jeg ikke synes, det er i orden at modtage et defekt produkt, når man har betalt [redacted]. Forventningen til et headset i den prisklasse er naturligvis, at det fungerer fejlfrit og lever op til de tekniske specifikationer. Da headsettet er defekt fra start, vil jeg helst bede om at få pengene tilbage. Hvis dette ikke er muligt, er jeg dog også åben for en ombytning til et nyt eksemplar. Da headsettet er helt nyt, er jeg dog ikke interesseret i en langvarig reparation på flere uger, da jeg i så fald vil stå uden det produkt, jeg lige har købt. Jeg håber derfor på en hurtig løsning, så jeg kan komme videre. Hvordan får vi løst dette hurtigst muligt? Med venlig hilsen, [Customer] Telefonnummer [phone]
cases.human_reply: Hej [Customer], Tusind tak for din besked. Jeg er ked af at høre, at du har modtaget det der ser ud til at være et defekt headset. Ift. returnering af produktet, har vi en 30 dages returret, herefter kan vi tilbyde en ombytning. Er disse informationer korrekte? [redacted] [address] [redacted] Denmark [phone] [email] Jeg kan umiddelbart se, at telefonnummeret, som du har skrevet i mailen er nyt... Med disse kan jeg lave et label til dig, så vi kan få det sendt retur, samt sende et nyt headset ud til dig! Jeg glæder mig til at høre tilbage fra dig - hav en fantastisk dag! Venlig Hilsen / Kind Regards, [Agent]

cases.subject: New customer message on 9 May 2026 at 22.18
cases.body:
You received a new message from your online store's contact form.

Country Code:
DK

Name:
[redacted]

Email:
[email]

Company / Team:
idk

Your Country:
danmark

If Applicable, Place Of Purchase And Order Number:

What Is Your Request Regarding?:
A-Spire Wireless

What Do You Need Help With?:
Other

Body:
hej
mit headset slukker bare random her og der det kan være hvis jeg
ser youtube eller hvis jeg sidder og spiller også vil det kun
tænde hvis jeg sætter lader i det selvom det har 100% strøm hvad
gør jeg?
cases.human_reply:
Hej there,

Det er ærgerligt at høre, at dit A-Spire Wireless headset slukker tilfældigt. For at løse problemet, anbefaler jeg at udføre en fabriksnulstilling af headsettet. Følg disse trin:

1. Sluk headsettet.
2. Tryk og hold tænd/sluk-knappen nede i 15 sekunder.
3. Du vil høre en stemmebesked, der bekræfter, at fabriksnulstillingen er udført.

Bemærk, at dette vil slette alle gemte Bluetooth-forbindelser fra dit headset, inklusive din telefon/PC og dongle. Du skal også slette headsettet fra dine enheders gemte enheder og fra AceZone-appen, før du parrer igen.

Sørg desuden for at slå Standby Timer i AceZone-appen fra.

Efter fabriksnulstillingen skal du parre headsettet og donglen igen:

1. Sæt donglen i din PC.
2. Nulstil donglen ved at holde knappen nede, indtil LED'en bliver lilla.
3. Fjern donglen.
4. Tænd dit headset, og sørg for, at der ikke er tilsluttet kabler.
5. Hold støjreduceringsknappen (lige ved siden af tænd/sluk-knappen) nede i 4 sekunder for at aktivere parringstilstand.
6. Sæt donglen tilbage i. LED'en vil blinke blå/rød.
7. Paringen sker automatisk. LED'en bliver blå, når parringen er færdig.

Løser trinene ikke problemet, går vi videre med en garanti-/ombytningssag.

Jeg ser frem til at høre fra dig.

cases.subject: New customer message on 3 May 2026 at 17:09
cases.body:

Company / Team:

Your Country:
Sweden

If Applicable, Place Of Purchase And Order Number:

What Is Your Request Regarding?:
A-Spire

What Do You Need Help With?:
Other

Body:
Hi there, I bought an A‑Spired Cable Version headset a few
years ago and I’m unsure if I’m updating it correctly. The
headset shows version 146 — is that the latest? The app doesn’t
show any available updates for this model.

Also, the sound feels quite low compared to other headsets — is
there a way to improve or increase the audio quality?

Kind regards,
[redacted]
cases.human_reply:
Hi there,

Thank you for reaching out. I'm sorry to hear you're having trouble with your headset.

The firmware version 146 is indeed the latest for the A-Spire headset, so your device is up to date. Regarding the audio quality, the A-Spire does not support EQ management, so there aren't settings to adjust the sound profile. However, ensure that the headset is securely connected and check for any interferences that might affect the sound.

If you continue to experience issues, feel free to let us know.

cases.subject: New customer message on April 27, 2026 at 12:44 pm
cases.body:
New customer message on April 27, 2026 at 12:44 pm
You received a new message from your online store's contact form. Country Code: US Name: [redacted] Email: [email] Company / Team: Your Country: If Applicable, Place Of Purchase And Order Number: Order #[order number] What Is Your Request Regarding?: A-Spire What Do You Need Help With?: Headset is physically damaged Body: I know I sent a support request a couple months ago about my earpads falling off randomly one day and unable to put them back on. I just realized, are the earpads on the site compatible with my headset (A-Spire Wired)? It doesn't seem so. If they aren't what other options do I have?
cases.human_reply: Hi there, Thank you for reaching out! Technically, they are compatible - the only difference is, that the A-Spire Wired has its ear pads attached more firmly than the Wireless model. Therefore, you can remove them if you carefully - but firmly - remove them forcefully. If you decide to order a spare set of ear pads, we cannot be held accountable for any damages that can occur from the removal and reattachment of the ear pads. With that being said, I can offer you an A-Spire Wireless with a discount of 20% (239USD) to allow you to have replaceable ear pads in the future. I look forward to hearing back from you 😃 Have a lovely day! Best regards, [Agent] Support Associate Acezone.io

DK

Name:
[Customer] 

Email:
[email]

Company / Team:

Your Country:
Danmark

If Applicable, Place Of Purchase And Order Number:
Acezone.io order number: [order number]

What Is Your Request Regarding?:
A-Spire Wireless

What Do You Need Help With?:
Connectivity / Pairing

Body:
Hej, jeg har lige købt mit aspire wireless, men jeg kan
ikke få det til at du' uden ledning. Jeg kan godt connecte med
bluetooth, men så er der jo rigtig meget delay på. Når jeg putter
ledningen i headsettet så duer headsettet som det skal, men når
jeg bruger dongle, så reagerere headsettet overhovedet ikke, hvad
skal jeg gøre? Kan i evt. sende en ny dongle? Tak på forhånd.
Hilsner fra [Customer]
cases.human_reply:
Hej [Customer],

Tak for din besked.

Prøv gerne denne guide (Engelsk):

With the headset powered on and connected to your PC via USB-C cable, open the Device Manager window on your PC.

- Find the headset under Sound, video and game controllers, then right-click it and uninstall the drivers.
- Unplug the headset
- Plug it back into the same USB port. (If you want to use it on another USB port, you have to follow this process again, as the driver belongs to the specific USB port you are using).

After that, try to do a factory reset:

- Turn the headset off.
- Press and hold power button for 15 seconds.
- A voice prompt will tell you a factory reset has been made.

Please note that this will delete all saved Bluetooth connections from your headset, including your phone/PC and dongle. You should also delete the headset from your phone/PC's saved devices, as well as delete it from the AceZone app before pairing again. We'll need to re-pair the headset and the dongle:

- Plug the dongle into your PC.
- Reset the dongle by holding down the button until the LED turns purple.
- Remove the dongle.
- Turn your headset on, and make sure no cables are connected.
- Hold the Noise Cancelling mode button (right next to the power button) for 4 seconds to enable pairing mode.
- Plug the dongle back in. The LED will blink blue/red.
- Pairing will happen automatically. The LED will turn blue when the pairing is done.

Herudover skal du også sørge for, at både dit headset og dongle er opdateret til den nyeste FirmWare opdatering gennem vores AceZone FirmWare Updater software fra MS Store.

Følg også denne, hvis problemet ikke løses:

If the customer has already updated the firmware for both the headset and the dongle, an update for the driver needs to be made:

Ensure that the Format in Windows Sound Settings is set to 48000Hz.

If the problem persists, you will need to update the dongle driver under Device Manager, and install the "(Generic USB Audio)" driver.
Do this by finding the AceZone Dongle driver;
- Click "Update Driver"
- Browse drivers
- Select "Let me pick from a list of available drivers"
- Untick "Compatible Drivers" and find "(Generic USB Audio)"
- Select and click "Next".

Once it has been updated with the new driver, it will require a reboot. Once started up again, your microphone should work with Dongle connection.

Jeg glæder mig til at høre tilbage fra dig! 😃

cases.subject: New customer message on 14 May 2026 at 23.27
cases.body:
You received a new message from your online store's contact form.

Country Code:
DK

Danmark

If Applicable, Place Of Purchase And Order Number:

What Is Your Request Regarding?:
A-Spire Wireless

What Do You Need Help With?:
Headset not charging / Not turning on/off

Body:
hello

my a-spire wireless dont want to power on even when i have a
cable connected to it, and it shows that its charging
cases.human_reply:
Hi there,

Let's try a few troubleshooting steps to resolve the issue with your A-Spire Wireless headset not powering on. Please follow these steps:

1. Ensure the headset is properly connected to a power source using the USB-C cable. Try using a different cable or power source if possible to rule out any issues with the cable or charger.

2. Perform a factory reset on the headset:
   - Turn the headset off.
   - Press and hold the power button for 15 seconds until you hear a voice prompt indicating a factory reset has been completed.

3. After the reset, try turning the headset on again.

If the headset still does not power on after these steps, please try:

Let us try to find the connection issue, which I think is related to bluetooth.
The order of the steps are important in order to get a result.
Make sure not to have the USB Cable connected while pairing Bluetooth or launching the AceZone Control App !
Make sure your headset is turned on !Turn off Bluetooth on all devices, (Mobiles, iPads, PC´s), that could have established a connection to your headset.Turn Off your headset

There is a possibility that your headset did not complete the Bluetooth shut down process, before the headset powered off itself.
Turn On Bluetooth on your mobile (where you keep the AceZone App) and erase the A-Spire Wireless in the list of bluetooth devices.Hold down the headset power button until it goes into pairing mode. Choose A-Spire Wireless in the list of unpaired devices.

Now you should have a fresh Bluetooth connection to your Mobile.
I hope this solved the connection issue.

I look forward to hearing from you 🙂

cases.subject: Re: Closing Ticket [order number] ---------------------------------------------- Hi there, Mar 9, 2026, 23:57 GMT+1 You received a new message from your online store's contact form. **Country Code:** US **Name:** [redacted] **Email:** [email]
cases.body:
Previous Ticket ID: [order number]

I am reaching out again due to the headset's issue. To recap, the original
headset I got, A-Spire Wireless, ended up having a microphone issue. The
voice in the headset would say "microphone muted, microphone unmuted" over
and over, slight movements of the mic would cause it. I messaged support,
showed a video as proof and got a replacement. Well, the replacement ended
up having the same issue in much less time than the first. I will attach a
video as proof of the replacement doing the same thing. I tried just
getting over it and to not move the mic at all, but it does it so often I
don't even use the headset anymore and got a different one. Since this
issue has happened with two headsets now, I would like to request a refund
as I am not looking to gamble with another one.
cases.human_reply:
Hi there,

Thank you for reaching out again.

Our mute switch is sensitive in the "standing up" position and we therefore recommend to use the mic clip when muting the microphone.
It is important to put the microphone all the way up when muting to ensure the switch has been properly activated.

If you wish to initiate a refund, I will need you to send the headset to the following address:

AceZone Returns
Prep Partners
[address]

Please mark the package as "AceZone Product Return #[order number]".

Kindly select a trackable courier service, and forward it here once you have done so 🙂
Once received, I'll initiate the refund.

And the second one also cracked but even earlier and now the third one have so bad battery time and mic is loose when I fold it up so sometimes you hear ”mic muted” and instant ”mick unmuted” just by touching the mic a little bit. And now I feel like why should I need to get a fourth headset when they just dosen’t work as they should? I want my money back so I could buy another headset from another brand. cases.body:
Re: [AceZone] Re: New customer message on 13 April 2026 at 19:56
This is a follow-up to your previous request #[order number] "New customer message on 13 ..." Guten Tag, Gibt es schon Neuigkeiten für mich ? Ich habe ein weiteres Problem manchmal wenn ich spreche höre ich mich selber obwohl ich diese Einstellung deaktiviert habe. Jedoch höre ich mich nicht normal sondern metallisch. Liebe Grüße [Agent] < [email] > schrieb am Di. 14. Apr. 2026 um 12:54: Hello again, Thank you for the reply. I have forwarded this to my engineers to get some insights from them 😃 Once I hear back from them, I will return with their reply. For now, please try: With the headset powered on and connected to your PC via USB-C cable, open the Device Manager window on your PC. Find the headset under Sound, video and game controllers, then right-click it and uninstall the drivers. Unplug the headset Plug it back into the same USB port . ( If you want to use it on another USB port, you have to follow this process again, as the driver belongs to the specific USB port you are using ). After that, try to do a factory reset: Turn the headset off . Press and hold power button for 15 seconds. A voice prompt will tell you a factory reset has been made. Please note that this will delete all saved Bluetooth connections from your headset, including your phone/PC and dongle. You should also delete the headset from your phone/PC's saved devices, as well as delete it from the AceZone app before pairing again. We'll need to re-pair the headset and the dongle: Plug the dongle into your PC. Reset the dongle by holding down the button until the LED turns purple . Remove the dongle. Turn your headset on, and make sure no cables are connected . Hold the Noise Cancelling mode button (right next to the power button) for 4 seconds to enable pairing mode. Plug the dongle back in. The LED will blink blue/red. Pairing will happen automatically. The LED will turn blue when the pairing is done. Thank you again, and I look forward to returning with more
cases.human_reply: Hi there, Thank you for reaching out again. I apologise for not returning with a response. Did you try the steps I suggested in the previous e-mail? For the metallic sound, could you confirm whether or not your headset is up to date with our latest firmware? This also includes the dongle 🙂 You mention that Sidetone is turned off, but you still hear yourself - does this occur every time you speak or only occasionally? A guide for our FirmWare Updater: Search for AceZone Firmware Updater on the Microsoft Store, and download the app. Then: Make sure your headset is powered on , and that it is not connected to any Bluetooth devices (turn off Bluetooth on any devices the headset might be connected to). Disconnect your USB-C dongle if it is connected to your PC. Connect your headset via the USB-C cable to your PC. Open the Firmware Updater app. Select the A-Spire Wireless from the dropdown menu. Click Update. Once the update is done, you can connect the dongle to your PC. Select the dongle from the dropdown menu. Click Update . At this point you should be on the latest firmware version for the A-Spire Wireless. Then, make sure that "Voice Clarity" is turned off under Windows Sound Settings and that no other Audio Software is interfering. Furthermore, has the issue persisted the same, or has anything changed in the battery's behavior? Thank you again - I look forward to hearing back from you! 😃 [Agent]

cases.subject: New customer message on 12 April 2026 at 17.01
cases.body:
New customer message on 12 April 2026 at 17.01
You received a new message from your online store's contact form. Country Code: DK Name: [redacted] Email: [email] Company / Team: Your Country: Denmark If Applicable, Place Of Purchase And Order Number: Here #[order number] What Is Your Request Regarding?: A-Spire Wireless What Do You Need Help With?: Other Body: Returning the headset. I have opened it and tried it, but wasn't able to comfortably use it. I don't have the original shipping box anymore, but everything else is intact. I still have the box with the headset design naturally. How would returning the headset go? Is it possible to drop it off at [address]?
cases.human_reply: Hi there, Thanks for reaching out. Our policies and returns instructions are as follows: As per our policy, we accept returns within our 30-day return period, even if the product has been opened and briefly tested. Since the headset has been unsealed and worn, it can no longer be sold as new. In accordance with EU consumer protection law, we may deduct an amount from your refund to reflect any diminished value resulting from handling beyond what is necessary to assess the product’s nature, characteristics, and functioning, or for cleaning/sanitation costs or replacement of parts that have been exposed to skin and sweat (earpads). Once we receive the returned headset, we will inspect its condition to determine whether any cleaning, sanitisation, or part replacement is required. Based on this assessment, we will calculate any applicable deduction and provide you with the details before issuing the refund - which will be issued 14 days after receiving it, at the latest. To proceed with the return: 1. Please ensure all original packaging and components are included in the return. 2. Book and print a return label (you may pick any courier which ships directly to our office address) and tape it securely to the face of the shipping package. Send the item to: AceZone International ApS [address] Att.: AceZone International ApS Phone: [phone] Email: [email] 3. Hand in the package for return at your local return access point/shop You are free to choose any courier service that ships directly to our office. Once we have received and assessed the product, we will contact you regarding the refund amount and initiate the refund through your original payment method. Let us know if you have any further questions 🙂 Have a lovely day! [Agent]

Body:
Hello AceZone Support,

I recently purchased a pair of headphones from you, but
unfortunately I have been experiencing serious issues with the
microphone.

The problem is that my voice keeps cutting in and out constantly.
People on the other side can barely hear full sentences because
the audio keeps disappearing intermittently. I have already tried
adjusting all available noise isolation and microphone settings,
but none of the methods solved the issue.

At this point, I suspect that the microphone may have a factory
defect.

Because of this, I would like to request either:

a refund/return for the headset, or
a replacement headset if possible, in which case I can send the
current one back to you.

Please let me know how we can proceed.
cases.human_reply:
Hi there,

Thanks for providing the details. Since you've already tried adjusting the settings without success, we'll proceed with a warranty review for your A-Spire Wireless headset. Please send us a video or audio recording documenting the microphone issue. Once we have that, we can move forward with a Return For Swap case.

I look forward to your response.

Denmark

What Is Your Request Regarding?:
A-Spire Wireless

What Do You Need Help With?:
Setting up headset

Body:
Hej, håber i forstår hvad jeg skriver, ellers må i lige
skrive at jeg skal oversætte.
Jeg kan ikke få lov til at få mit headset til at connecte med
appen på telefonen, nu har jeg prøvet og lave factory reset, og
prøve en anden telefon. Men det fungere stadig ikke. Den siger at
connection failed - og ved ikke hvad jeg skal gøre her.

Headsettet siger også paring mode men sker ikke noget.

[redacted]
cases.human_reply:
Hej [Customer],

Tak fordi du kontakter os. Vi er kede af at høre, at du oplever problemer med dit A-Spire Wireless headset.

Lad os prøve følgende trin for at få det til at fungere:
1. Sørg for, at dit headset er tændt, og at det ikke er forbundet til nogen Bluetooth-enheder. Glem headsettet i Bluetooth, samt sluk Bluetooth på alle enheder, som headsettet kan være forbundet til.
2. Frakobl din USB-C dongle, hvis den er tilsluttet din PC.
3. Tilslut dit headset til din PC via USB-C kablet.
4. Åbn AceZone Firmware Updater appen, som du kan finde i Microsoft Store.
5. Vælg A-Spire Wireless fra dropdown-menuen og klik på "Update".

Efter headsettet er FirmWare opdateret, kan du holde ANC knappen nede i 4 sekunder for at sætte det i Pairing Mode. Herefter skal du forbinde headsettet direkte til din mobil enhed med Bluetooth.

Åben herefter AceZone appen, og prøv at forbinde igen.

Det er vigtigt at notere, at det også kan hjælpe at have fjernet headsettet på appen på forhånd, så man starter fra bunden.

Jeg ser frem til at høre fra dig.

cases.human_reply:
Hej,

Tak fordi du kontakter os. Det er ærgerligt at høre, at du oplever problemer med dit headset.

For at løse problemet med dit A-Spire Wireless headset, kan du prøve følgende:
1. Sørg for, at både dit headset og dongle er opdateret med den nyeste firmware. Du kan downloade AceZone Firmware Updater fra Microsoft Store og opdatere derfra.
2. Prøv at lave en fabriksnulstilling af headsettet:
 - Sluk headsettet.
 - Hold tænd/sluk-knappen nede i 15 sekunder, indtil du hører en stemme, der bekræfter nulstillingen.
 - Bemærk, at dette vil slette alle gemte Bluetooth-forbindelser.
3. Efter nulstillingen, skal du parre headsettet og donglen igen:
 - Sæt donglen i din PC.
 - Nulstil donglen ved at holde knappen nede, indtil LED'en bliver lilla.
 - Fjern donglen.
 - Tænd for headsettet, og sørg for, at der ikke er tilsluttet kabler.
 - Hold Mode-knappen nede i 4 sekunder for at aktivere parringstilstand.
 - Sæt donglen tilbage i. LED'en vil blinke blå/rød og derefter blive blå, når parringen er fuldført.

Jeg ser frem til at høre fra dig, hvis problemet fortsætter.

cases.body:
You received a new message from your online store's contact form.

Country Code:
DE

Name:
[redacted]

Email:
[email]

Company / Team:

Your Country:
Sweden

If Applicable, Place Of Purchase And Order Number:
Order #[order number]

What Is Your Request Regarding?:
A-Spire Wireless

What Do You Need Help With?:
Other

Body:
Hello.

As I've understood, I'm not able to return the headset after use,
I've opened the package and the headset is not at all what I
expected after just 10 minutes of use.

I understand that it's a niche use, but even me as an advanced player feel like my previous headset, while it is half
broken, is still better.

I've gone through multiple EQ's and nothing can make it come
close to my old headset, steps are still better and the ANC isn't
really that special compared to my other headset.

If I return the headset, are you able to reimburse the payment or
not?
cases.human_reply:
Hi there,

Thank you for reaching out.

I am sorry to hear that you have had a poor experience with our product.

It is essential for proper use that your headset and dongle are up to date with our newest FirmWare.
You can update them via our AceZone FirmWare Updater software from MS Store 🙂

Furthermore, have you correctly paired the headset to your dongle (if you are using wireless connection)?

For returns and our policies, I will list a guide:

As per our policy, we accept returns within our 30-day return period, even if the product has been opened and briefly tested. Since the headset has been unsealed and worn, it can no longer be sold as new. In accordance with EU consumer protection law, we may deduct an amount from your refund to reflect any diminished value resulting from handling beyond what is necessary to assess the product’s nature, characteristics, and functioning, or for cleaning/sanitation costs or replacement of parts that have been exposed to skin and sweat (earpads).

Once we receive the returned headset, we will inspect its condition to determine whether any cleaning, sanitisation, or part replacement is required. Based on this assessment, we will calculate any applicable deduction and provide you with the details before issuing the refund - which will be issued 14 days after receiving it, at the latest.

To proceed with the return:

1. Please ensure all original packaging and components are included in the return.

2. Book and print a return label (you may pick any courier which ships directly to our office [address]) and tape it securely to the face of the shipping package. Send the item to:

AceZone International ApS
[address]

3. Hand in the package for return at your local return access point/shop

You are free to choose any courier service that ships directly to our office. Once we have received and assessed the product,

cases.subject: Dongle not working
cases.body: Hi, the USB dongle for my A-Spire Wireless won't connect to my PC anymore. What do I do?
cases.human_reply: Hi there, let's get your dongle reconnected. Re-pair it by holding the dongle button until it flashes, then reconnect via USB-C. If that fails we'll replace it.

cases.subject: A-Rise warranty claim
cases.body: My A-Rise stopped working after 5 months. I bought it directly from your store. Can I get it repaired or replaced under warranty?
cases.human_reply: Hi there, your A-Rise is covered by warranty. Please send a photo of the issue and your order number so we can arrange a replacement.

cases.subject: Headset cracked, no order number
cases.body: Hi, my A-Spire headset cracked near the headband. What can I do?
cases.human_reply: Hi there, sorry to hear that. So we can help with a replacement, could you share your order number and a photo of the damage?
